# fmc_access_control_policy_inheritance (Data Source)

This data source reads the Access Control Policy Inheritance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fmc_access_control_policy_inheritance" "example" {
  id                       = "76d24097-41c4-4558-a4d0-a8c07ac08470"
  access_control_policy_id = "76d24097-41c4-4558-a4d0-a8c07ac08470"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_control_policy_id` (String) Id of the Access Control Policy.
- `id` (String) Id of the object

### Optional

- `domain` (String) Name of the FMC domain

### Read-Only

- `base_access_control_policy_id` (String) Id of the base (parent) Access Control Policy.
- `type` (String) Type of the object; this value is always 'AccessPolicyInheritanceSetting'.
